description: Nigel started his career at Sellafield in 1991 on the BNFL Graduate Training Scheme as a health physicist and held several senior roles on the site. He came to LLWR in June 2006 as part of the project team to establish it as a stand-alone Site Licence Company (SLC) and led the work to obtain the new Nuclear Site Licence and Environmental Authorisation. He was a member of the original SLC board and was offered the opportunity to remain as Executive Director when UKNWM took over management of the site in 2008. Nigel is now the Head of Safety and Regulatory Liaison at LLWR.

details.body:
Nigel started his career at Sellafield in 1991 on the BNFL Graduate Training Scheme as a health physicist and held several senior roles on the site.

He came to LLWR in June 2006 as part of the project team to establish it as a stand-alone Site Licence Company (SLC) and led the work to obtain the new Nuclear Site Licence and Environmental Authorisation. He was a member of the original SLC board and was offered the opportunity to remain as Executive Director when UKNWM took over management of the site in 2008. Nigel is now the Head of Safety and Regulatory Liaison at LLWR.
